nasb.text: Then the servant ran to meet her, and said, “Please let me drink a little water from your jar.”

esv.text: Then the servant ran to meet her and said, “Please give me a little water to drink from your jar.”

cnv.text: 僕人就跑去迎著她，說：“請你把瓶裡的水給我喝一點。”

ccb.text: 老总管跑上前去对她说：“求你给我一点水喝。”

csbs.text: 那仆人迎着她跑去，说：“请你让我喝一点你罐子里的水。”
